user.title: Volume Governor - Select Devices
user.description: Select the audio output devices you want Volume Governor to manage. Only devices that support volume control are shown.

schedule.title: Volume Governor - Schedule
schedule.description: Configure when volume governance is active. Tap a device switch on the dashboard to engage the governor — it will automatically disengage at the end time. Enable 'Persistent' mode on a device to keep it governed indefinitely.

error.no_devices_selected: You must select at least one device.

abort.already_configured: Volume Governor is already configured. Use Options to modify.
abort.no_devices_found: No audio devices with volume control found in Home Assistant.

error.no_devices_selected: You must select at least one device.

abort.no_devices_found: No audio devices with volume control found in Home Assistant.
